description: The QuadBrushTool component is a tool used to draw clouds of rotated quads.

fields.Pivot: the position offset for the rotation Pivot for quads.
fields.DualSided: Whether the drawn quads are dual sided.
fields.MinRotation: the minimum rotation of a drawn quad.
fields.MaxRotation: the maximum rotation of a drawn quad
fields.RotationSpace: The transform space to apply rotations on drawn Quads in.

methods.ChangeSize: Handles changing the size of the brush of a brush tool.
